title: rubus horridus var. hybridus
intro: Rubus horridus var. hybridus, also known as the hybrid hybrid blackberry or the hybrid thorny blackberry, is a plant species within the genus Rubus, which is characterized by its thorny canes and edible fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus horridus var. hybridus include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
